title.en: After saying that, the Blue Fish Domain Ancesto...

content.en:
The Blue Fish Domain Ancestor just reminded Ye Tian under the order of the Battle Gate, and did not say much.

After saying that, the Blue Fish Domain Ancestor left.

After the herring fish domain ancestor left, Ye Tian was a little dignified.

He knew very well that no matter where he was, there were forces that wanted to make trouble.

Now that the situation in the Dark Sacred Realm is chaotic, I am afraid that the forces that want to make trouble at this time will come out, and the value of the Xuanxu Sacred Realm is too high, and there are definitely many domain ancestors who want him to die.

Maybe at any time, the Supreme Domain Ancestor will attack him.

As for the Invincible Domain Ancestor, he shouldn't have come to assassinate him.

After all, the Invincible Domain Ancestor was also a big man in the Dark Sacred Realm, so he wouldn't come to the Xuanxu Sacred Realm to assassinate him.

Moreover, if there was really an invincible domain ancestor attacking him, the battle gate would definitely not let go of that invincible domain ancestor.

If it was the strongest domain ancestor who attacked, if he was killed, it would be inferior in skill, even if the battle gate would be angry, but the consequences would not be so serious.

The forces of the Dark Sanctuary, none of them dared to send the Invincible Domain Ancestor to attack him.

After all, the invincible domain ancestor made a move, and it was to bully the small with the big.

After all, there is an unwritten rule in the Dark Sanctuary that the Invincible Domain Ancestor is not allowed to attack the Supreme Domain Ancestor, the Supreme Domain Ancestor is not allowed to attack the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and the Ancestor is not allowed to attack the Supreme Domain Ancestor at will.

Otherwise, it would be difficult for those geniuses to grow.

"If the Invincible Domain Ancestor doesn't make a move, with my strength, I am not afraid of any Supreme Domain Ancestor, not to mention that in the Xuanxu Saint Realm, I can use the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm to crush everything, if anyone dares to make a move on me, then wait for bad luck!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't worry about his own safety, he was mainly worried about the safety of his family, so he left everything that needed to save his life to his family, and asked his family not to leave the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Next, Ye Tian had another choice, that is, whether he should use the Soul Saint Realm Flower or not.

The Soul Saint Realm Flower can allow a Supreme Domain Ancestor to raise his soul to the level of Soul Holy Light, easily impacting the realm of the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

Ye Tian would not impact the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm with Soul Holy Light, but it was undeniable that the Soul Saint Realm Flower could allow his soul to reach the level of Soul Holy Light, thus saving countless years.

Otherwise, if he wants to raise his soul to the level of soul light, he is afraid that it will take a long time.

Moreover, the Soul Saint Realm Flower is not very helpful to the Supreme Domain Ancestor of the Soul Holy Light level, because it cannot help the Supreme Domain Ancestor to condense the Holy Soul, and if you want to condense the Holy Soul, the Soul Saint Realm Flower is not qualified enough.

But Ye Tian only had such a Soul Saint Realm Flower in his hand, once he used it, his family would not be able to use the Soul Saint Realm Flower.

"Let's use it, anyway, the Soul Saint Realm will give birth to new Soul Saint Realm flowers in the future, and maybe the Xuanxu Saint Realm will also give birth to treasures that are more precious than the Soul Saint Realm flowers. At present, improving my strength is the most important, once I am raised to the level of Soul Holy Light, my strength will usher in a small transformation. "

Ye Tian decided.

So, Ye Tian took out the Soul Saint Realm Flower and began to refine it.

The soul saint realm flower energy is very strong for the soul refining, as if the soul is instantly torn apart countless parts, but the energy it contains will repair the soul tear, so the refining effect far exceeds the effect of refining in the soul saint realm.

Originally, Ye Tian's soul was already very powerful, if 100 points of the soul was the soul holy light level, then Ye Tian had reached the level of seventy or eighty points before.

Now that he has refined the Soul Saint Realm Flower, it didn't take too long to refine one-third of the Soul Saint Realm Flower, and he has completely stepped into the Soul Saint Light level.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's soul was condensed to the extreme, and a trace of holy light emanated from the soul origin, this trace of holy light was like a thread of white thread, containing powerful power, and like essence, it was integrated into the whole body, and it could be combined with domain power to exert powerful attack power.

Because of this, once you step into the Soul Holy Light level, your strength will increase a lot.

Ye Tian combined the soul holy light with the domain power, and casually unleashed a blow, and the power of this blow skyrocketed.

"The Soul Light has increased my attack power by about 2 times!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

Of course, if you do this, it will make the soul holy light consumption more serious, which is equivalent to using the soul power to fight, once the battle time is long, the soul will be very weak, this weakness is the weakness of the soul origin, it is difficult to make up for it in a short time.

However, this kind of consumption will not overdraw the potential, and it will be too helpful for the battle, so everyone wants to give birth to the soul light.

The birth of the Soul Holy Light is just the beginning, for example, how powerful Ye Tian's soul is, but the Soul Holy Light is very rare, after all, he has just given birth to the Soul Holy Light, if the entire soul is transformed into the Soul Holy Light, that kind of soul is the Holy Soul!

However, once the Supreme Domain Ancestors gave birth to the Soul Holy Light, they were satisfied, and they would go to the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm.

After all, it was almost unrealistic for them to want to elevate their souls to the Holy Soul level.

I don't know how many incomparably ancient Supreme Domain Ancestors, and they have cultivated so far, and they are far from reaching the Holy Soul level.

Ye Tian continued to refine the Soul Saint Realm Flower, because once the Soul Saint Realm Flower destroyed the whole, it had to be fully refined in a short period of time, otherwise the other parts would slowly dissipate.

Therefore, it is not realistic to want to save the Soul Saint Realm Flower for other people to use.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to refine all the Soul Saint Realm Flowers, and more soul holy light was born, and the soul holy light could increase Ye Tian's attack power by 3 times.

But I don't know how far away this is from the impact of the Holy Soul level, and even so far away that Ye Tian can't see the end.

"I just gave birth to such a little soul holy light, which can increase the attack by 3 times, even if it is used for holy skills, it will weaken a lot, but it can also increase the power of holy skills. If it were those Supreme Domain Ancestors who had traveled a long way on the path of Soul Holy Light, how terrifying was their amplification effect and how terrifying their combat power was?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

At this time, he finally understood the meaning of the herring fish domain ancestor's reminder.

He really can't be proud, those who are not saint-endowed, but if there is enough soul holy light, it is enough to make up for the gap in holy skills.
